label.title: JCR Account Creation Notification Settings
label.description: Configure the email sent to administrators when a JCR user account is created.
label.recipientPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the Jahia default mail recipient
label.senderPlaceholder: Leave empty to use the Jahia default mail sender
label.subject: Subject
label.saveError: An error occurred while saving the settings.
label.loadError: An error occurred while loading the settings.
label.invalidEmail: Please enter a valid email address.
